## Problem

What specific problem is being addressed? What breaks today, and what does it cost the partner?

## Partner

Who is the partner organization? Who is the proposed domain steward?

## Origin

Where did this come from — a Create night, a hackathon prototype, or a direct partner request? Link to any related discussion or prototype.

## Redemptive angle

Who is worse off today, and what specifically will be different for them? See [`docs/vision/redemptive-frame.md`](../../docs/vision/redemptive-frame.md).

## Proposed scope (draft)

A first-pass sense of minimum durable scope — this will be refined during discovery, see [`docs/playbooks/running-a-discovery.md`](../../docs/playbooks/running-a-discovery.md).

## Guardrail check

Confirm this proposal doesn't cross any line in [`docs/model/guardrails.md`](../../docs/model/guardrails.md).

## Proposed lead / team

Who is proposing to lead this, and who else is interested in joining?
